title: VayuDrishti Agent Log
description: Redacted transparency trace for the agentic layer (spec 14, owner: vayu-agents). Global file at web/public/data/agentlog.json (NOT per-city; it cannot ride in per-city manifest.files). Judges see the machinery: per-role model, reasoning budget, token usage, and duration. RAW reasoning is NEVER published (spec 14, acceptance 20); only aggregate counters appear here. 'runs' is the spec per-role array; 'totals' is a convenience roll-up for the web /about-data transparency line.

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 Z of the last successful agent run.

fixture.description: True when the underlying briefs were built from fixture artifacts.

stale.description: True when the last agent run failed and the previous log was kept / an empty run set emitted (spec 14 failure semantics).

model.description: Model id used across roles, e.g. nvidia/nemotron-3-ultra-550b-a55b.

runs.description: One entry per role invocation (a repaired role may appear more than once, or carry a repairs count). Ordered by execution.

role.description: Agent role (spec 14). The deterministic digest and resolver are not LLM roles and are not logged here.

city.description: City slug this invocation ran for (roles run per city).

reasoning_budget.description: reasoning_budget ceiling for this role (Analyst ~8k, Strategist ~8k, Drafter ~4k, Verifier ~4k).

tokens_in.description: Prompt tokens billed for this invocation (includes any repair turns folded in).

repairs.description: Repair rounds consumed by this role (bounded at 2, spec 14).

calls.description: Total NIM chat calls this run (bounded per publish, spec 14).

totals.description: Roll-up across all runs for the single-line transparency display.

passed.description: True when every ref in the published briefs re-resolved (acceptance 18).

refs_checked.description: Total evidence_refs + basis_refs independently re-resolved against the published artifacts.

audit.description: Resolver-receipts result as published DATA (the self-audit run at generation), so a consumer can render an 'independently audited' stamp instead of computing it client-side.
